summary: Pilot Launch Feature (Iteration 78) - All 22 backend API tests PASS (100%), Frontend fully functional with all 11 sub-panels working. 10-part Production Pilot Launch system verified: Part 1 (Environment), Part 2 (Supplier Traffic - Paximum/AviationStack), Part 3 (Monitoring - Prometheus/Grafana), Part 4 (Incident Detection - 8 rules, 3 alert channels), Part 5 (Agency Onboarding - 3 agencies), Part 6 (Booking Flow - hotel/flight), Part 7 (Incident Test - supplier_outage/payment_error/database_slowdown), Part 8 (Performance - P95 latency, supplier reliability), Part 9 (Report - readiness score, components), Part 10 (Go-Live Decision - GO/CONDITIONAL_GO/NO_GO).
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard endpoint correctly combines readiness_score, decision (GO/CONDITIONAL_GO/NO_GO), risk_level, 9 components, go_live_checklist, recent_events
Environment endpoint properly returns pilot_environment with status, max_agencies, feature_flags, monitoring/alerting status
Supplier traffic correctly handles shadow/limited/full mode activation for both Paximum and AviationStack suppliers
Monitoring returns Prometheus (targets, metrics_collected) and Grafana (5 dashboards) status with tracked_metrics
Incident detection has 8 rules (supplier_outage, queue_backlog, payment_failure_spike, etc.) with 3 alert channels
Agency onboarding creates accounts with credentials (admin_email, api_key) and proper validation steps
Booking flow executes 8 steps (search → pricing → availability → booking → payment → supplier → voucher → notify) with SLA checks
Production incident tests verify fault_injection → detection → impact_assessment → auto_recovery → verification phases
Performance metrics provide P95 latency (api_ms, supplier_ms, e2e_booking_ms), supplier reliability, booking success rate
Pilot report calculates weighted readiness score across 9 components with target 9.5/10 threshold
Go-Live decision returns GO (score >= 9.5, all checklist pass), CONDITIONAL_GO (score >= 8.0), or NO_GO with next_steps

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Pilot Launch tab visible, all 11 sub-panels functional, actions execute correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - pilot launch uses simulated realistic production data with randomized metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pilot Launch fully implemented and tested. Readiness score 10/10 exceeds 9.5 target. All 22 API endpoints working. Frontend has 11 sub-panels: Overview (9 score components + checklist + events), Environment (status, feature flags, activate action), Suppliers (Paximum/AviationStack with shadow/limited/full modes), Monitoring (Prometheus/Grafana dashboards), Incidents (8 detection rules + simulate actions), Agencies (3 pilot agencies + training materials), Booking Flow (hotel/flight with 8-step execution), Incident Test (supplier_outage/payment_error/database_slowdown), Performance (P95/reliability/throughput), Report (readiness score breakdown + recommendations), Go-Live (decision + checklist + next steps). Data uses SIMULATED VALUES for realistic testing.

features_verified.Part1_Pilot_Environment: PASS - status, max_agencies, feature_flags, infrastructure, safety, activate preflight checks
features_verified.Part2_Supplier_Traffic: PASS - Paximum and AviationStack with shadow/limited/full modes, auth status, endpoints config
features_verified.Part3_Monitoring_Stack: PASS - Prometheus (12 targets, 5000-8000 metrics) + Grafana (5 dashboards), tracked_metrics
features_verified.Part4_Incident_Detection: PASS - 8 detection rules, 3 playbooks, 3 alert channels (slack, pagerduty, email), simulate actions
features_verified.Part5_Agency_Onboarding: PASS - 3 pilot agencies (Antalya Travel Pro, Istanbul Flights Hub, Bodrum Holidays), pricing_tiers, training_materials
features_verified.Part7_Incident_Test: PASS - 3 scenarios (supplier_outage, payment_error, database_slowdown) with recovery phases
features_verified.Part8_Performance_Metrics: PASS - P95 latency (api/supplier/e2e), supplier_reliability (paximum/aviationstack), booking_success_rate, throughput
features_verified.Part9_Pilot_Report: PASS - readiness_score 10/10, 9 components with weights, traffic_statistics, incident_log, recommendation
features_verified.Part10_GoLive_Decision: PASS - decision GO, 10 checklist items, risk_level low, pilot_summary, next_steps
features_verified.Dashboard_Combined: PASS - All metrics combined with active_agencies, checklist_pass_rate, recent_events

frontend_panels_verified: Suppliers - Paximum/AviationStack cards with mode toggles
Booking Flow - hotel/flight toggle, execute action, step results
Incident Test - scenario selection, execute action, phase results
Performance - P95 metrics, supplier reliability, traffic summary
Report - readiness gauge, component breakdown, supplier reliability, incident log
Go-Live - decision card, 10 checklist items, pilot summary, next steps
mocked_note: Pilot launch data uses SIMULATED VALUES with realistic production metrics (e.g., 2% env activation failure rate, 3% booking step failure rate). Not actual production pilot data.
